text_original: I hope you remove the limited chat and change it into an ad because it's annoying to wait for 40minutes or you could make the 40 minutes to 10 minutes
text_zh: 我希望你们能取消聊天限制，并将其改为观看广告，因为等待40分钟太烦人了，或者你们也可以把40分钟缩短到10分钟。
reply_original:
Hello! I completely understand your frustration. It is really annoying when the conversation is going well and the limit runs out. I am so sorry for this experience!

To be transparent, maintaining high-quality AI involves very high server costs. Currently, ad revenue alone isn't enough to cover the cost of "unlimited" messages for everyone.
reply_zh:
你好！我完全理解你的沮丧。当对话进行得很顺利却达到限制时，确实非常令人恼火。我对这种体验深表歉意！

坦诚地说，维护高质量的 AI 需要极高的服务器成本。目前，仅靠广告收入还不足以负担为所有人提供“无限次”消息的成本。
